Paddington Coffee House is a true hidden gem! From the moment you step inside, the enticing aroma of freshly brewed coffee welcomes you, creating a warm and inviting ambiance. Their menu strikes the perfect balance between classic favorites and innovative creations, making every visit a culinary delight. We had the pleasure of trying their Pizza, Sushi, Garlic Bread, Chicken Lollipop, Momos, Mojitos, and CappuccinoŌĆöall were absolutely delicious and impeccably prepared.

The cozy d├®cor and thoughtful seating arrangement make it an ideal spot for everything from casual hangouts to quiet moments of relaxation. Adding to the charm, Meena Subba, the passionate owner, brings her love for the coffee house to life through her dedication and hospitality. To top it all off, we enjoyed playing games like Uno and Jenga, which added a fun and unique touch to the experience. Paddington Coffee House is truly a haven for food and coffee lovers alikeŌĆöan absolute must-visit!

Recommended dishes
Chicken Jhol Momos 8 Pieces, Mushroom Pizza, Fried Chicken Wings, Souffle Pancake

I recently visited Paddington Coffee House near Sikkim Manipal Institute of Technology, and I was really pleased by the overall experience.

The service was impeccable, with friendly and attentive staff who made me feel right at home. The food was delicious and the pricing was reasonable, offering great value for the quality of the food and service provided.

The cafe had a cozy and inviting ambiance, making it the perfect place to relax and enjoy a cup of their delightful cappuccino.

I highly recommend Paddington Coffee House to anyone in the area looking for a fantastic cafe experience.

column2: "I stumbled upon Cozy Corner and I'm so glad I did! This hidden gem is the perfect spot to relax and unwind. The atmosphere is warm and inviting, with plush couches and soft lighting that makes you feel like you're in your own living room. The service is top-notch, with friendly staff who go above and beyond to make sure you're comfortable. And the food? Absolutely delicious! I had the best cup of coffee and pastry I've had in a long time. What really sets Cozy Corner apart, though, is the sense of community. It's clear that this is a place where locals gather to catch up and connect. I felt so welcome and at ease, even as a newcomer. If you're looking for a cozy spot to curl up with a good book, meet with friends, or simply enjoy some quiet time, Cozy Corner is the perfect place. I'll definitely be back!"
